c74object.name: paulstretch.stream~
c74object.description: Stretches a live signal using the Paulstretch extreme time-stretching algorithm. The incoming signal is continuously recorded into a fixed-length window and the stretcher scans that evolving recording.
c74object.discussion: The spectral-processing effects are applied in a fixed order on each analysis frame, regardless of the order in which you enable them: harmonics, tonalnoise, freqshift, pitchshift, octaves, spread, filter, the arbfilter curve, and finally compressor. Each enabled stage transforms the spectrum and hands it to the next, so the compressor always operates on the fully shaped result. This order is fixed by the underlying Paulstretch library and cannot be reordered.

method.name: stretchenv
method.description: Sets a breakpoint curve that modulates the stretch factor as the input cursor advances. Arguments are alternating position value pairs, where position is normalized 0.0-1.0 and value is a stretch multiplier. Sending the message with no arguments clears the envelope.

method.name: arbfilter
method.description: Sets a breakpoint curve of spectral gains. Arguments are alternating position value pairs, where position is normalized 0.0-1.0 across the spectrum and value is a linear gain. A non-empty list also enables the arbitrary filter; sending the message with no arguments clears it and turns it off.

attribute.name: stretch
attribute.description: Time-stretch multiplier (minimum 1.0, default 8.0). Updates take effect immediately without restarting DSP.

attribute.name: fftsize
attribute.description: Size of the analysis/resynthesis window (default 4096). Larger sizes smear more. The value may be rounded to a size the FFT backend supports. Changes apply on the next DSP restart.

attribute.name: windowsize
attribute.description: Length of the circular buffer of recent input that the stretcher scans (default 5000 ms). Changes apply on the next DSP restart.

attribute.name: window
attribute.description: Shape of the analysis/resynthesis window: Rectangular, Hamming, Hann (default), Blackman, or Blackman-Harris. Changes apply on the next DSP restart.

attribute.name: onset
attribute.description: Sensitivity of transient (onset) detection, 0.0-1.0 (default 0.0 = off). Higher values let the stretcher advance faster through detected attacks so percussive material stays articulate rather than smeared. Updates take effect immediately.

attribute.name: pitchshift
attribute.description: Turns the spectral pitch shifter on or off. The shift amount is set by pitchcents. Default off.

attribute.name: pitchcents
attribute.description: Pitch transposition in cents (100 cents = one semitone) applied when pitchshift is enabled. Default 0.

attribute.name: octaves
attribute.description: Turns the octave mixer on or off. Band gains are set by octavemix. Default off.

attribute.name: octavemix
attribute.description: Six gains mixed into the output, one per octave band: -2, -1, 0, +1, +1.5, and +2 octaves. Active when octaves is enabled. Default 0 0 1 0 0 0 (dry signal only).

attribute.name: freqshift
attribute.description: Turns the (linear, inharmonic) frequency shifter on or off. The amount is set by freqshifthz. Default off.

attribute.name: freqshifthz
attribute.description: Linear frequency shift in Hz applied when freqshift is enabled. Default 0.

attribute.name: compressor
attribute.description: Turns the spectral compressor on or off. It applies a single broadband gain to each analysis frame, evening out the output's overall loudness over time rather than shaping dynamics per frequency band. Strength is set by comppower. Default off.

attribute.name: comppower
attribute.description: How strongly each frame is pushed toward a constant loudness when compressor is enabled. At 1.0 every frame is normalized to the same level; lower values level partially. Default 0 (no effect).

attribute.name: filter
attribute.description: Turns the spectral filter on or off. The passband is set by filterlow / filterhigh; filterstop inverts it to a notch. Default off.

attribute.name: filterlow
attribute.description: Lower edge of the filter band in Hz. Default 0.

attribute.name: filterhigh
attribute.description: Upper edge of the filter band in Hz. Default 22000.

attribute.name: filterdamp
attribute.description: Progressive attenuation toward the top of the passband. Default 0.

attribute.name: filterstop
attribute.description: When enabled, the filter band is rejected instead of passed, turning the bandpass into a notch. Default off.

attribute.name: harmonics
attribute.description: Turns the harmonic resonator on or off, keeping only energy near a harmonic series of harmfreq. Default off.

attribute.name: harmfreq
attribute.description: Fundamental frequency of the harmonic series in Hz. Default 440.

attribute.name: harmbw
attribute.description: Width of each harmonic band in cents. Default 25.

attribute.name: harmcount
attribute.description: How many harmonics of harmfreq to retain. Default 10.

attribute.name: harmgauss
attribute.description: When enabled, harmonic bands use a smooth Gaussian profile instead of a hard gate. Default off.

attribute.name: spread
attribute.description: Turns spectral spreading on or off, smearing energy across nearby bins. Width is set by spreadbw. Default off.

attribute.name: spreadbw
attribute.description: Amount of spectral spreading applied when spread is enabled. Default 0.3.

attribute.name: tonalnoise
attribute.description: Turns tonal/noise preservation on or off, biasing resynthesis toward the tonal part of the spectrum. Default off.

attribute.name: tonalpreserve
attribute.description: How strongly tonal content is preserved over noise, 0.0-1.0. Default 0.5.

attribute.name: tonalbw
attribute.description: Analysis bandwidth used by tonal/noise preservation. Default 0.9.
